name: Cookies and Cream Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cookie crumbs and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Soften gelatin in cold water; stir over low heat until dissolved.
3. Mix cream cheese and sugar until well blended on an electric mixer at medium speed.
4. Gradually add gelatin mixture and milk, mixing until well blended.
5. Chill until the mixture is thickened but not set.
6. Fold in whipped cream.
7. Reserve 1 1/2 cups of the cream cheese mixture; pour remaining into crust.
8. Top with cookies and reserved cream cheese mixture.
9. Chill until firm.
